column12: Measurement condition : Fill; Mostly Cloudy , No Precipitation , Moderate Wind Blowing Cross Stream
column13: Significant channel infill/deposition following intense scour and bank erosion last week. Lots of soil and rocks ended up in river.
column14: Good quality ARCBoat/M9 mmt @ gauge, some communication issues on far bank affected 2st transect, issue mitigated after that.  @ Uncertainty: QRev Uncertainty Analysis (DS Mueller, 2016), 2-sigma value (1 x Uncertainty Value reported in *.xml File). @ Orifice out of water upon arrival, due to being dragged during last week's event, SRC is invalid, assume zero SRC since last visit. Cleared debris from around orifice line/block, dragged it into the water, only in about 1.2m of water due to depths and unstable banks. will have to reposition later in the year, perhaps with a boat as well.  ADCP by Moving Boat
HG: 3.202 Surge: 0.005  * The uncertainty value is equivalent to the surge value in eHSN.  Found (FD)

column12: Measurement condition : Clear; Partly Cloudy , No Precipitation , Calm Wind
column13: Despite significant amounts of scour , deposition has also occured, channel is likely in equilibrium, rating model still accurate for these conditions.
column14: After repeated failed attempts to measure @ gauge, a mmt was conducted at the Hwy 43 bridge in whitecourt town site. Lag time is estimated to be 1-2 hours. Used logged values with lagtime to calculate MGH. Very good quality given conditions, Issues with GGA GPS, but BT and VTG were in agreement with one another in QRev. Boat capsized once before starting but did not affect mmt.  @ Uncertainty: QRev Uncertainty Analysis (DS Mueller, 2016), 2-sigma value (1 x Uncertainty Value reported in *.xml File). @ Used logged readings to calculate MGH, as gauge was visited yesterday evening and sensor was reading accurately, no movements or disturbances overnight,.  ADCP by Moving Boat

column14: Good quality under-ice measurement, but with low SNR. Arrived onsite to find tank empty (think it ran out just last night). Changed tank @ 0945.
